prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 15866→17768→19711→18320→21842，整体呈波动后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 5976 名；2025 年基准约 21842 名，较 2024 年大幅后移约 3522 名，显示竞争加剧；该校在重庆物理类招生计划 2021 年 56 人、2022 年 60 人、2023 年 61 人、2024 年 65 人、2025 年 69 人，逐年小幅扩招；2026 年计划 73 人，较 2025 年再扩招 4 人（+5.8%），扩招趋势延续，对位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 76 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 76–77 名区间，属中上水平理工类院校；2022 年曾因师德师风事件出现偏负面声誉，但 2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应，无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度未进入前 100 名，曝光度一般；未见明显投档断档记录；安全科学与工程 A+（全国顶尖）、测绘科学与技术 A-、土木工程 A-，均为该校传统优势学科；与招生专业中的安全科学与工程类、测绘类、土木工程等直接对应，对相关专业报考有稳定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其 自动化、电子信息/通信等专业 2026 年热度为高热推荐/推荐，该校对应专业招生位次靠前，吸引高分考生；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 20.9 万，物理类估算约 13.6 万人，较 2025 年（13.95 万）略降约 2.5%，竞争略有缓解，近年波动较小；该校位于北京市，对西南地区考生有一定跨省吸引力；2025 年在重庆物理类招生 69 人，占该校总计划比例较小，属正常外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划扩招 5.8% 带来的竞争加剧、本省物理类考生略减带来的竞争缓解、以及学校声誉平稳、热门专业热度持续等因素，在 2025 年基准 21842 名基础上，扩招主导位次后移，考生减少小幅对冲；预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 22572 名，区间 22072–23072 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 22572 名，区间 22072–23072 名。建议位次在区间内考生以二档专业（安全科学与工程类、测绘类、数学类等）为主攻方向，一档专业（计算机、电气、人工智能）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（土木、采矿、 地质等）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<22072）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>23072）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 15866 → 17768 → 19711 → 18320 → 21842, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5976 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 21842, a significant backward shift of about 3522 places compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 56 in 2021, 60 in 2022, 61 in 2023, 65 in 2024, and 69 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year; the 2026 plan is 73, an increase of 4 (+5.8%) from 2025, continuing the expansion trend, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 76th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Chinese Universities (2026), stable in the 76–77 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering institutions; in 2022, there was a somewhat negative reputation due to a teacher ethics incident, but the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the university's management response, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity did not enter the top 100, with average exposure; no obvious records of admission gaps; Safety Science and Engineering A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, all traditional advantageous disciplines of the university; directly corresponding to the enrollment majors such as Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering, providing stable support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended/recommended in 2026, with the corresponding enrollment rankings of the university being relatively high, attracting high-scoring students; the total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in this province is about 209,000, with an estimated 136,000 in the Physics Category, a slight decrease of about 2.5% compared to 2025 (139,500), slightly easing competition, with small fluctuations in recent years; the university is located in Beijing, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to candidates from the southwestern region; in 2025, it enrolled 69 students in the Physics Category in Chongqing, accounting for a small proportion of the university's total plan, which is a normal scale of out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the intensified competition due to the 5.8% expansion of the 2026 plan, the slight easing of competition due to the slight decrease in the number of Physics Category candidates in the province, the stable reputation of the university, and the sustained popularity of hot majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 21842, the expansion dominates the backward shift of rankings, with the decrease in candidates providing a small offset; the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is about 22572, with a range of 22072–23072.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 22572, with a range of 22072–23072. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors (Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, Mathematics, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence) can be used as sprint choices, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Mining, Geology, etc.) as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<22072) can focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors; those with rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>23072) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as backups.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次近年小幅后移、招生计划连续三年持平、考生规模基本稳定等因素，在 2025 年基准 2840 名基础上，预计位次小幅波动；预测 2026 年历史类最低位次约 2855 名，区间 2355–3355 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category in 2024–2025 were approximately 2607→2840, with a slight backward shift of about 233 places over the past two years; the 2025 baseline is about 2840; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 2 students in 2024, 2 students in 2025, and remains 2 students in 2026, with the plan unchanged for three consecutive years, no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 76th on the Soft Science main list, a mid-to-upper level science and engineering institution with a very small liberal arts enrollment; reputation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity not in the top 100, exposure average; no record of file dropping or gaps; the university is primarily engineering-focused, with only one liberal arts major (Administrative Management), and no corresponding A-class discipline evaluation data.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The estimated number of History Category examinees in this province for 2026 is about 73,000, basically flat compared to 2025 (73,400), with small fluctuations in recent years; the university is located in Beijing, with only 2 History Category slots, a very small-scale enrollment, limited influence from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight backward shift in History Category rankings in recent years, the enrollment plan unchanged for three consecutive years, and the stable number of examinees, based on the 2025 baseline of 2840, a small fluctuation in rankings is expected; the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 2855, with a range of 2355–3355.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The university only offers the Administrative Management major with 2 slots for History Category in Chongqing, with a very small enrollment scale. The predicted ranking is about 2855, with a range of 2355–3355. Candidates with rankings within the range may consider applying; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<2355) have a higher admission probability, while those near the upper limit (>3355) should be cautious.
